pi_items.source: task.json description field specifies saving to '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/particle_model.flipchart'
task.json description field explicitly states 'Save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/particle_model.flipchart'
task.json description field states 'Create a new flipchart with exactly 3 pages' with Page 1 (Solid), Page 2 (Liquid), Page 3 (Gas)
task.json description field states 'Page 1 (Solid): ... fill it with at least 9 Blue circles representing tightly packed particles'
task.json description field states 'Page 3 (Gas): ... fill it with at least 5 Red circles representing high-energy particles moving freely'

task.json description specifies adding titles 'Solid State' (contains 'Solid'), 'Liquid State' (contains 'Liquid'), 'Gas State' (contains 'Gas'). The verifier uses case-insensitive substring matching for these terms.

privileged_info_summary: This task requires creating a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart demonstrating the particle model of states of matter. The file must be saved as 'particle_model.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/'. Page 1 (Solid) requires at least 9 blue circles representing tightly packed particles. Page 2 (Liquid) requires at least 9 blue circles representing loosely arranged particles. Page 3 (Gas) requires at least 5 red circles representing freely moving high-energy particles. Each page must have a title containing 'Solid', 'Liquid', or 'Gas' respectively, plus rectangular containers for the particles. All metadata claims are verified against the task description and align with standard science education models of matter.
